rationale: Gov't Code §2001.057 governs continuances in contested case hearings. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2001.057. CONTINUANCES. (a) A state agency may continue a hearing in a contested case from time to time and from place to place.
_note: Rule concerns administrative hearing continuances; no bearing on homestead exemption policy.
